ddls:
CREATE TABLE "voice_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voice segment */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider of the voice segment */,
  "sentence" TEXT /* The original sentence from the voice segment */,
  "up_votes" INTEGER /* Number of up-votes received for the segment */,
  "down_votes" INTEGER /* Number of down-votes received for the segment */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the speaker */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the speaker */,
  "accent" TEXT /* Accent of the speaker */,
  "locale" TEXT /* Locale of the speaker */,
  "segment_number" INTEGER /* Segment number (if the segment is part of a series) */,
  "sentence_length" INTEGER /* Length of the sentence in the segment */,
  "is_asian" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the speaker is Asian */,
  "us_eu" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the speaker is from the US or EU */,
  "job_name" TEXT /* Name of the job or task associated with the segment */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* File name of the voice segment */,
  "transcript" TEXT /* Transcript of the voice segment */,
  "recording_date" TEXT /* Date when the segment was recorded */,
  "recording_location" TEXT /* Location where the segment was recorded */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language of the segment */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the speaker */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the transcription */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the segment was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voice_segments_gender FOREIGN KEY ("gender") REFERENCES genders ("gender_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voice_segments_age_group FOREIGN KEY ("age_group") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voice_segments_locale FOREIGN KEY ("locale") REFERENCES locales ("locale_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voice_segments_accent FOREIGN KEY ("accent") REFERENCES accents ("accent_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voice_segments_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voice_segments_sentence_length FOREIGN KEY ("sentence_length") REFERENCES segment_lengths ("length_range")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the provider */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the provider's services */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the provider was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the provider */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the provider (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Range of ages in the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the age group was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the gender was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accents" (
  "accent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accent */,
  "accent_name" TEXT /* Name of the accent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the accent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the accent was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the accent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locales" (
  "locale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each locale */,
  "locale_name" TEXT /* Name of the locale */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country associated with the locale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the locale was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the locale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("locale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segment_lengths" (
  "length_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each length */,
  "length_name" TEXT /* Name of the length category */,
  "length_range" TEXT /* Range of sentence lengths */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the length category was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the length category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("length_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segments_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voice segment */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of additional data */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the additional data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the additional data was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the additional data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segments_data_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES voice_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, linguist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voice segment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the segment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the segment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the segment */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES voice_segments ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voice segment */,
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotator */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value of the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the annotation was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES voice_segments ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_annotator_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotator_id") REFERENCES annotators ("annotator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotators" (
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotator */,
  "annotator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the annotator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the annotator */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the annotator (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the annotator was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the annotator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voice segment */,
  "rater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rater */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the rater */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the rating was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_ratings_rater_id FOREIGN KEY ("rater_id") REFERENCES raters ("rater_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_ratings_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES voice_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "raters" (
  "rater_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rater */,
  "rater_name" TEXT /* Full name of the rater */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the rater */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the rater (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the rater was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the rater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rater_id")
)
